calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
William D. Rauch, Jr., Esq. appeared for plaintiff West Bay Seafood Company, Inc.,
Plaintiff Witness Hong Pham and Josie Jew were placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant William F. Alber.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $53,627.22
Prejudgment Interest - $3,305.00
Attorney's Fees - $2,070.00
Costs - $600.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $59,602.22

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Continued To Sep-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
